name: Studio Apartment
description: Hand-drawn studio apartment recovered from a blurry phone photo. Three rooms: Kitchen and Bath stacked on the left, LivingArea (Living/Sleep) on the right.

rooms.label: Kitchen
rooms.notes: Top-left room. Dimension text reads '10 x 10' but source is blurry; moderate confidence.

rooms.label: Bath
rooms.notes: Bottom-left room, directly below Kitchen. Dimension text reads '10 x 10' but source is blurry; moderate confidence.

rooms.label: Living / Sleep
rooms.notes: Right-side full-height room. Dimension text appears to read '12 x 20' (matches stacked Kitchen+Bath height of 20). Slightly lower confidence due to blur on the larger digits.

connections.notes: Door swing arc clearly visible at the bottom of the Bath/LivingArea shared wall.

openings.notes: Small gap visible on Kitchen's right wall near the top; ambiguous in blurry source.
